last_cycle_summary: Completed one bounded Deployment/Docs/Demo cycle. Re-read V1 planning/status files, README, demo script, local/private deployment notes, release notes, package scripts, and AgentOps checker entrypoint. Added truthful V1 private-pilot operator caveats to README, demo, release, and deployment docs, including the local source-index export manifest path and the remaining Supabase/runtime/review-eval/UI-smoke limitations. No product behavior changed.
scope_completed: README now includes a V1 Private Pilot Snapshot with working local scope, unavailable scope, and final UI-smoke caveat.
Demo script now describes the local audit_pack.source_index_manifest export path and labels review-derived eval material as local/helper fixture output.
Local and private deployment docs now carry the Supabase, runtime persistence, approval retry, external-provider, and not-legal-advice boundaries.
Release notes now distinguish the V1 local source-index export manifest update from production/Supabase/runtime readiness.
mandatory_caveats_carried: Review-derived eval cases still lack durable review-resolution API/status semantics and are not claimed as a persisted review-to-eval workflow.
Supabase V1 document/chunk/source listing is unavailable.
Supabase V1 runtime persistence is unavailable.
No public persistV1RuntimeResult route or approval retry wiring exists.
No legal advice generation, no production SaaS readiness, and no guaranteed legal correctness.
External model calls remain off by default for sensitive/private data and must stay explicit, configurable, logged, and auditable.
The updated Playwright route spec was not run; full UI smoke remains a final validation item.
blockers: No docs blocker remains for local/private-pilot handoff.
Final UI smoke validation is still required before a final release acceptance claim.

Production SaaS, Supabase V1 source listing, Supabase V1 runtime persistence, public runtime persistence route, approval retry wiring, real external providers, durable review-resolution semantics, and legal correctness remain out of scope.
final_validation_recommendation: Run jq over .agentops/v1/status/*.json and node .agentops/scripts/check-agentops.mjs after this docs cycle.
Before final handoff, run focused frontend export/source-index tests and the updated Playwright route/UI smoke in a seeded local environment.

Do not publish release language beyond local/private-pilot scope until Supabase source listing/runtime persistence, public runtime route/retry semantics, durable review-resolution state, and external-provider approval policy are implemented and verified.
next_actions: Orchestrator should run final validation planning and include full UI smoke as an explicit remaining item.
Future docs updates can add an acceptance matrix after final validation results are available.
